summary: Comprehensive testing of Niyyah Daily Islamic app - Backend 100% (14/14 tests), Frontend 100% functional. All critical features tested and working.

minor.issue: Pytest warnings about return values in test functions - cosmetic only

issues: Design is excellent - dark green Islamic theme (#022c22), glassmorphism, amber accents all working well

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint (/api/) - 200 OK
Backend: User registration with unique email - 201 Created
Backend: Duplicate email rejection - 400 Bad Request
Backend: Login with valid credentials (test@niyyah.app) - 200 OK
Backend: Login with invalid email - 401 Unauthorized
Backend: Login with wrong password - 401 Unauthorized
Backend: Save practice state - 200 OK
Backend: Get practice state by date - 200 OK
Backend: Practice state requires auth - 401/403
Backend: Update practice state - 200 OK
Backend: Save history - 200 OK
Backend: Get history - 200 OK
Backend: History requires auth - 401/403
Backend: E2E flow (register -> save -> retrieve) - Complete
Frontend: Onboarding 3-step flow (logo → levels → city)
Frontend: Intention modal with 4 choices (rapprochement, engagement, reconstruction, gratitude)
Frontend: Bottom navigation - all 4 tabs working (ACCUEIL, PRATIQUE, MÉDITER, STATS)
Frontend: Accueil page - streak, level, score, hadith, heatmap display
Frontend: Prayer times API (Aladhan) - Paris/Casablanca times displayed
Frontend: Checklist page - 5 prayers with checkboxes (Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha)
Frontend: Dhikr section - Ayat al-Kursi (with audio button), Shukr, Basmala
Frontend: Wird sections - Matin (5 items) and Soir (5 items) expandable with audio buttons
Frontend: Qibla compass - 136° direction with compass visualization
Frontend: Score calculation - updates correctly (tested 0% → 25% → 73%)
Frontend: Level tabs - 4 levels visible (Fondations, Approfondissement, Connaissance, Rayonnement)
Frontend: Level 2 locked until 100% score - correct behavior
Frontend: Auth modal - login/register forms working
Frontend: Login flow - test@niyyah.app works correctly
Frontend: Cloud sync indicator after login
Frontend: Logout button visible after login
Frontend: Stats page - streak, medals (Bronze/Argent/Or), weekly calendar, badges
Frontend: Badges display - Premier Pas, Flamme Naissante, Semaine Bénie, Persévérance, Mois Sacré, 100 jours
Frontend: Meditation mode - 3/5/10 min timer options, play/pause, meditation phrases
Frontend: Ramadan mode - activation button works, moon icon appears in header
critical_code_review_comments: App is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
LocalStorage used for offline-first approach, cloud sync optional
Audio playback may not work due to browser autoplay policy - this is expected browser behavior, not a bug
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features fully tested and working. Backend API 100% functional with JWT auth. Frontend features: onboarding (3 steps), intention modal (4 choices), 4-tab navigation, 5 prayers checklist, dhikr items, wird sections (matin/soir), qibla compass, counters, meditation mode, stats/badges, auth flow, cloud sync, ramadan mode. Audio playback depends on browser autoplay policy. Level 2-4 unlock after 100% score on previous level.

features_verified.navigation: Working - all 4 tabs (ACCUEIL, PRATIQUE, MÉDITER, STATS)
features_verified.dhikr_items: Working - Ayat al-Kursi (with audio), Shukr, Basmala
features_verified.wird_sections: Working - Matin/Soir expandable with 5 items each
